channel.title: poetry on Dillon de Silva
channel.description: Recent content in poetry on Dillon de Silva

item.title: A Momentary Appreciation for Sound
item.description: If all the sounds in the world vanished amongst silence If the unique spectrum of tones were to diffuse away Oh the treachery For I cannot imagine such a world A world without sound Like the waves radiating through the oceans She travels far and wide The wild summer parties manifesting with adolescent romance The old couple sharing a slow dance Whilst the young ones learn to boogie Yet here I lay
